evals.prompt: Enable ad and tracker blocking on all my devices
evals.expected_output: Enables ads and tracking blocklists on all tunnels
expectations: Calls dns_get_options to show available blocklists
Calls dns_set_subscription for ads with enabled=1 and apply_to_all=1
Calls dns_set_subscription for tracking with enabled=1 and apply_to_all=1

evals.prompt: A website is broken, I think it's being blocked. Whitelist example.com
Set up DNS blocking on my phone without using VPN
evals.expected_output: Creates a Secure DNS hash and provides setup instructions
expectations: Calls public_dns_create_hash to generate DoH/DoT URLs
Provides the DoH URL and DoT hostname
Gives platform-specific setup instructions (iOS or Android)
Explains this works without the VPN connection

evals.prompt: What's being blocked on my network?
evals.expected_output: Shows DNS blocking stats and active subscriptions
expectations: Calls dns_blocklist_stats to show overall stats
Calls dns_get_tunnel_config to show per-tunnel config
Presents total blocked domains and active blocklists
